title: A Cosmic Hello from Earth
story: Beep beep beep! In 1974, scientists sent a special message zooming through space. On November 16, they used a giant radio telescope in Puerto Rico to beam the first intentional interstellar radio message. This cosmic 'hello' was aimed at a faraway cluster of stars called M13, about 25,000 light-years from Earth. It was like sending a space postcard to potential alien neighbors!

title: Explorers Uncover Lost Maya City
story: Hidden in the jungles of Central America, an ancient city slept for centuries. In 1839, two brave explorers changed everything. title: Houston's Towering Defense Ties NBA Record
story: Swat! Block! Reject! The Houston Rockets' defense soared to new heights in 1984. On November 16, they swatted away an incredible 20 shots against the Denver Nuggets.
